message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem empty_partition_unique (p : Nat.Partition 0) : p = empty := by\n  have hsum : p.entries.sum = 0 := p.sum_eq\n  have hnull : p.entries = [] := by\n    by_contra hne\n    have hzero : ∀ a ∈ p.entries, a = 0 :=\n      List.sum_eq_zero_iff.mp hsum\n    have hpos : ∀ a ∈ p.entries, 0 < a := p.pos\n    obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := List.exists_mem_of_ne_nil hne\n    have hz := hzero a ha\n    have hp := hpos a ha\n    exact (lt_irrefl 0) (hz ▸ hp)\n  apply Nat.Partition.ext\n  exact hnull",
  "declaration_name": "empty_partition_unique",
  "used_context": [
    "Nat.Partition structure with fields entries, pos, sum_eq",
    "Nat.Partition.ext",
    "List.sum_eq_zero_iff",
    "List.exists_mem_of_ne_nil",
    "lt_irrefl"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Assumes p.sum_eq is the field that states entries.sum = 0 (since p: Partition 0). If the field has a different name, adjust accordingly.",
    "empty is a constant of type Partition 0 implicitly defined as the empty tuple."
  ]
}
